ksa_text: Ability to communicate regulatory risk, compliance status, and risk assessment findings to executive and board-level audiences in business impact language.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Excluded on seniority grounds: the ability contains scope signals ('board.level') that exceed the manager-level Data Owner tier. STRM composite is minimal (0.0000 — likely framework vocabulary mismatch). The described responsibilities involve organizational-level authority not held by a manager-level role in the GOV category.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 3 match(es) in governance job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working Data Owner whose mandate centers on policy, oversight, and governance.
